name: ADDCN Technology Co., Ltd
summary: ADDCN Technology Co., Ltd operates online trading platforms in Taiwan and internationally. It operates 8591.com.tw, which offers a virtual treasure trading platform; 591.com.tw and 591.com.hk, a real estate information network platforms; 8891.com.tw, a second-hand car trading platform; and 518.com.tw, a job search and recruitment platform. The company also operates 100.com.tw that offers design case pictures of interior design companies; marry.com.tw, a wedding service platform for wedding-related services, such as wedding photography, records, and bride secretaries; chickpt.com.tw, a part-time job finding APP; and tasker.com.tw for home task function that includes water, electricity, maintenance, and cleaning activities. ADDCN Technology Co., Ltd was incorporated in 1997 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
